description:
Windows-native menu bar app for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats.

Win-CodexBar is a Windows-native desktop app for viewing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats from a small Tauri shell.
v0.29.0 ports upstream CodexBar 0.29 to Windows with Alibaba Token Plan tracking, OpenCode renewal dates, Codex standard vs fast cost splits, and the v0.28 Azure OpenAI, T3 Chat, Ollama, OpenAI, and MiniMax updates.
